title: Create: Marketplace
description: A global market board for Create: Numismatics. Register your shops, browse server-wide offers, and navigate to them using Xaero's Minimap.
body:
# рҹҸӘ Create: Marketplace

**Create: Marketplace** is a powerful expansion for the **Create** mod ecosystem, designed specifically for multiplayer servers. This mod bridges the gap between *Create* industrial automation and the *Create: Numismatics* currency system, establishing a unified global advertising board for all player-owned shops.

---

## вңЁ Features

### рҹӣ’ Global Market Board
No more wandering aimlessly looking for a specific item! Open the market with the default **`M`** key (or by using a Registration Card) to access a sleek interface where you can:
*   **Live Search:** Instantly find items, shops, or owners using the integrated search bar.
*   **Favorites System:** Star (вҳ…) your favorite shops to keep them at the very top of your list.
*   **Compare Prices:** See exactly what others are selling and for how much, all from one synchronized menu.

### рҹ“Қ Seamless Navigation
Thanks to built-in **Xaero's Minimap** integration, finding a shop in the world is a breeze:
*   Click **"Navigate"** on any offer, and the mod will automatically send a waypoint directly to your minimap.
*   Customize how shop waypoints appear (Basket icon, first letter, or custom symbol) via the config file.

### рҹ’і Easy Shop Registration
All you need is a **Registration Card**!
1. Set up your Vendor or Trade Station from *Create: Numismatics*.
2. **Right-click** the block with the Registration Card.
3. Name your shop, and you're live! Your listing is now visible to everyone on the server.

---

## рҹҢҗ Localization Support
The mod is fully localized and supports the following languages:
*   рҹҮәрҹҮё **English**
*   рҹҮөрҹҮұ **Polish**
*   рҹҮ©рҹҮӘ **German**
*   рҹҮӘрҹҮё **Spanish**
*   рҹҮ«рҹҮ· **French**

---

## рҹӣ  Requirements

To ensure everything works correctly, you will need:
*   **Minecraft:** 1.21.1
*   **NeoForge:** 21.1.228+
*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
*   [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-numismatics)

**Optional (Highly Recommended):**
*   [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)


**Optional:**
*   [Create: Tradeworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/tradeworks)

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration
Fine-tune the mod in `config/create_marketplace-common.toml`:
*   `waypointSymbolMode`: Change the map icon style (Icon / First Letter / Custom char).
*   `useCardDurability`: Toggle whether Registration Cards are consumed upon use.

---
